quote: The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Our greatest glory is not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
author: Confucius

quote: Well begun is half done.
author: Aristotle

quote: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.
author: Seneca

quote: Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out.
author: Robert Collier

quote: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: Nothing in life is to be feared; it is only to be understood.
author: Marie Curie

quote: The important thing is not to stop questioning.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: What we know is a drop, what we don't know is an ocean.
author: Isaac Newton

quote: The future depends on what you do today.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: It always seems impossible until it's done.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: Dream, dream, dream. Dreams transform into thoughts and thoughts result in action.
author: A. P. J. Abdul Kalam

quote: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act but a habit.
author: Will Durant

quote: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
author: Peter Drucker

quote: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: The roots of education are bitter, but the fruit is sweet.
author: Aristotle

quote: Knowledge is power.
author: Francis Bacon

quote: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
author: Plato (recording Socrates)

quote: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
author: William James

quote: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
author: Winston Churchill

quote: Life isn't about finding yourself. Life is about creating yourself.
author: George Bernard Shaw

quote: Small deeds done are better than great deeds planned.
author: Peter Marshall

quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: If I have seen further it is by standing on the shoulders of giants.
author: Isaac Newton

quote: No pain, no gain.
author: Common saying

quote: 千里之行，始於足下。
author: 老子

quote: 學而不思則罔，思而不學則殆。
author: 孔子

quote: 知之者不如好之者，好之者不如樂之者。
author: 孔子

quote: 三人行，必有我師焉。
author: 孔子

quote: 敏而好學，不恥下問。
author: 孔子

quote: 溫故而知新，可以為師矣。
author: 孔子

quote: 天行健，君子以自強不息。
author: 《周易》

quote: 地勢坤，君子以厚德載物。
author: 《周易》

quote: 鍥而不捨，金石可鏤。
author: 荀子

quote: 不積跬步，無以至千里。
author: 荀子

quote: 故天將降大任於是人也，必先苦其心志。
author: 孟子

quote: 生於憂患，死於安樂。
author: 孟子

quote: 業精於勤，荒於嬉。
author: 韓愈

quote: 書山有路勤為徑，學海無涯苦作舟。
author: 韓愈

quote: 寶劍鋒從磨礪出，梅花香自苦寒來。
author: 《警世賢文》

quote: 長風破浪會有時，直掛雲帆濟滄海。
author: 李白

quote: 會當凌絕頂，一覽眾山小。
author: 杜甫

quote: 路漫漫其修遠兮，吾將上下而求索。
author: 屈原

quote: 紙上得來終覺淺，絕知此事要躬行。
author: 陸游

quote: 有志者，事竟成。
author: 《後漢書》

quote: 失敗乃成功之母。
author: 中國諺語

quote: 今日事，今日畢。
author: 中國諺語

quote: 世上無難事，只怕有心人。
author: 中國諺語

quote: 讀萬卷書，行萬里路。
author: 董其昌

quote: 星光不問趕路人，時光不負有心人。
author: 網絡流傳
